description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build all wheels for testing that runs on push to master and on pull requests. Use a matrix job that builds wheels on multiple operating systems (macos-12, macos-13-large, ubuntu-22.04, windows-2019) with Python 3.11, installing cibuildwheel and twine, and running C++ tests. For each OS, build wheels with specific configurations and upload the resulting wheels as artifacts.
